column1: # ARIS skill catalog — single source of truth for selective install.

column1: # <requires> = comma-separated skills the entry invokes as hard pipeline phases
# (selecting the skill auto-includes them), or "-" for none. Soft "see also"
# mentions do NOT belong here. <short-description> = one concise line shown in
# the interactive picker / --list-groups. Every skills/<name>/SKILL.md must
# appear exactly once; tests/test_skill_groups.py enforces catalog completeness.
